title: mentha × dumetorum var. ayassei
intro: Mentha × dumetorum var. ayassei, also known as Mentha ayassol or the mint of the forest, is a variant of the hybrid mint species Mentha × dumetorum. This plant is a member of the Lamiaceae family and is native to the mountainous regions of the Middle East. The medicinal properties of Mentha × dumetorum var. ayassei include its expectorant and antiseptic properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues and promote wound healing. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from headaches and fever, and it can be prepared as a tea, essential oil, or tincture for various herbal applications.
